name: hello-utf8
goal: Create a UTF-8 encoded text file at greetings.txt containing exactly these three lines, in this order, each on its own line: 'Hello, UAS', 'こんにちは UAS', 'Olá UAS'. The file must use UTF-8 encoding (no BOM).

notes.purpose: Tier 0 smoke test for non-ASCII text handling. file_contains in this harness reads the file with the default UTF-8 codec; a model that writes Latin-1, ASCII-escapes the Japanese text, or emits a BOM will fail one of the three pattern checks.
